projectName: SrajanAI – AI-Powered CORS-Based Geospatial Solution for Precision Agriculture
shortDescription: AI-powered geospatial platform integrating CORS, high-accuracy GPS, and Sentinel-2 imagery for precision farm mapping and crop analytics.
overview: SrajanAI delivers sub-meter accurate farm and block boundary mapping with CORS-based precision positioning, NDVI/NDWI crop health monitoring, and AI-driven decision support for precision agriculture in Varanasi.
problemStatement: Agricultural boundary mapping and farm-level decision-making often suffer from inaccurate land records, low-precision GPS data, and fragmented geospatial information, resulting in inefficient irrigation, crop planning, subsidy distribution, and land management.
solution: An AI-powered geospatial solution that integrates Continuously Operating Reference Stations (CORS), high-accuracy GPS, Sentinel-2 satellite imagery, and machine learning to generate precise farm and block maps, crop health analytics, NDVI/NDWI indices, and decision-support tools for precision agriculture.

keyFeatures.name: Sub-meter Farm Mapping
keyFeatures.description: Sub-meter accurate farm and block boundary mapping.

keyFeatures.name: CORS Precision Positioning
keyFeatures.description: CORS-based precision positioning for geospatial accuracy.

keyFeatures.name: NDVI & NDWI Monitoring
keyFeatures.description: Crop health monitoring using vegetation and water indices.

keyFeatures.name: AI Crop Analytics
keyFeatures.description: AI-driven crop analytics and decision support.

keyFeatures.name: Irrigation Optimization
keyFeatures.description: Irrigation and fertilizer optimization recommendations.

keyFeatures.name: Land Verification
keyFeatures.description: Land ownership verification and dispute resolution support.

valueProposition: Provides highly accurate geospatial intelligence for agriculture, enabling precise farm mapping, improved crop planning, optimized irrigation and fertilizer use, transparent land records, faster dispute resolution, and data-driven decision-making for governments and financial institutions.
environmentalImpact: Optimized irrigation and reduced water usage
socialImpact: Strengthened rural governance through data-driven insights
expansionPlan: Pilot implementation across selected farms and FPOs, followed by integration with government land records, agricultural platforms, and large-scale district and state-level deployment.

projectName: Smart Soil Testing and Pest, Nutrient and Agronomic Advisory System
shortDescription: AI-powered precision agriculture platform with portable soil testing, IoT pest detection, and agronomic advisory via Bhu Parikshak and AgroLens.
overview: Scanxt combines portable soil testing devices, IoT, AI/ML, spectroscopy, and AI-enabled pest detection stations to deliver real-time soil analysis, pest monitoring, nutrient recommendations, and agronomic advisory.
problemStatement: Farmers often lack access to rapid, affordable soil testing and early pest detection, leading to excessive fertilizer and pesticide use, low crop productivity, soil degradation, and poor agronomic decision-making.
solution: AI-powered integrated precision agriculture platform combining portable soil testing devices, IoT, AI/ML, spectroscopy, and AI-enabled pest detection stations. The system provides real-time soil analysis, pest monitoring, nutrient recommendations, and agronomic advisory through the Bhu Parikshak and AgroLens applications.

keyFeatures.name: Portable Soil Testing
keyFeatures.description: Portable soil testing within minutes at the field level.

keyFeatures.name: AI Pest Detection
keyFeatures.description: AI-powered pest detection and monitoring stations.

keyFeatures.name: Nutrient Analysis
keyFeatures.description: Real-time nutrient analysis and recommendations.

keyFeatures.name: Precision Fertilizer Advice
keyFeatures.description: Precision fertilizer recommendations based on soil data.

keyFeatures.name: AgroLens Advisory
keyFeatures.description: Agronomic advisory through the AgroLens mobile app.

keyFeatures.name: Pest Outbreak Alerts
keyFeatures.description: Predictive pest outbreak alerts and early warnings.

valueProposition: Provides affordable, rapid, and AI-driven soil testing and pest management solutions that reduce chemical dependency, optimize fertilizer usage, improve crop productivity, lower farming costs, and make precision agriculture accessible to smallholder farmers.
environmentalImpact: Reduced excessive fertilizer and pesticide usage
expansionPlan: Operational across 25+ states, 150+ districts, and 6 countries with continued scale-up through FPOs and government partnerships.
currentLocation: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh — operational across 25+ states

shortDescription: Geospatial hiring platform connecting job seekers with nearby employment opportunities through location intelligence and skill-based matching.
overview: Qhills uses location intelligence to connect job seekers with nearby employment opportunities, automatically matching candidates based on skills, experience, education, preferred travel distance, and location.
problemStatement: Job seekers in rural and semi-urban areas face difficulties finding nearby employment opportunities, while employers struggle to identify suitable local talent due to the lack of location-based workforce intelligence and efficient recruitment tools.
solution: A geospatial hiring platform that uses location intelligence to connect job seekers with nearby employment opportunities. The platform automatically matches candidates based on skills, experience, education, preferred travel distance, and location, while helping recruiters discover and hire local talent efficiently.

keyFeatures.name: Location-based Job Discovery
keyFeatures.description: Discover nearby employment opportunities on an interactive job map.

keyFeatures.name: Interactive Job Map
keyFeatures.description: Visualize job openings and candidate clusters geographically.

keyFeatures.name: Auto-read Resumes
keyFeatures.description: Automatically extract skills and experience from resumes.

keyFeatures.name: Candidate Clustering
keyFeatures.description: Candidate clustering based on location and skills.

keyFeatures.name: Instant Job Alerts
keyFeatures.description: Real-time job alerts matched to candidate preferences.

keyFeatures.name: Recruiter Dashboard
keyFeatures.description: Smart filters and hiring analytics for recruiters.

valueProposition: Simplifies local hiring by matching candidates and employers based on geographic proximity and skills. Enables faster recruitment, improves local employment, reduces hiring costs, and provides an intuitive, scalable platform for workforce management.
socialImpact: Connects job seekers with nearby employers
expansionPlan: Initial rollout in Washim district followed by expansion to neighboring districts and statewide deployment in Maharashtra through a scalable cloud-based platform.

projectName: Bharat EV – Integrated EV Mobility Platform
shortDescription: Integrated geospatial EV mobility platform for charging station discovery, slot booking, trip planning, and infrastructure management.
overview: Bharat EV provides real-time EV charging station discovery, slot booking, trip planning, ANPR-based analytics, loyalty programs, infrastructure dashboards, and administrative controls for efficient EV ecosystem management.
problemStatement: EV users and infrastructure operators face challenges in locating charging stations, booking charging slots, planning trips, and managing EV infrastructure efficiently due to the absence of an integrated digital platform.
solution: An integrated geospatial EV mobility platform that provides real-time EV charging station discovery, slot booking, trip planning, ANPR-based analytics, loyalty programs, infrastructure dashboards, and administrative controls for efficient EV ecosystem management.

keyFeatures.name: Charging Station Discovery
keyFeatures.description: Real-time EV charging station locator on interactive maps.

keyFeatures.name: Slot Booking

keyFeatures.name: ANPR Analytics

keyFeatures.name: Infrastructure Dashboard
keyFeatures.description: Real-time station monitoring and management dashboard.

keyFeatures.name: Loyalty Programs
keyFeatures.description: Loyalty and rewards management for EV users.

valueProposition: Simplifies EV adoption through an intuitive route planning and charging platform, enables data-driven infrastructure management, and supports government and private stakeholders in planning and operating EV charging networks efficiently.
socialImpact: Improves public access to EV charging infrastructure
expansionPlan: Initial pilot in Vizianagaram targeting EV infrastructure operators, utilities, and local governments, followed by expansion across India for logistics and smart-city transport planning.

projectName: HELIOT ENVIROSE NSE – "One Village, One Weather Station" Powered by HELIOT.AI Integrated AIoT + GIS Platform
shortDescription: Solar-powered AIoT weather stations with GIS analytics delivering hyperlocal climate intelligence and smart irrigation advisories at village level.
overview: HELIOT ENVIROSE NSE deploys solar-powered AIoT Automatic Weather Stations integrated with GIS analytics for real-time village-level weather monitoring, hyperlocal forecasts, and climate risk management.
problemStatement: Farmers lack access to hyperlocal weather intelligence, real-time climate monitoring, and location-specific advisories, resulting in inefficient irrigation, poor fertilizer management, crop losses, and limited preparedness for climate-related risks.
solution: A solar-powered AIoT-based Automatic Weather Station integrated with GIS analytics that provides real-time village-level weather monitoring, hyperlocal forecasts, smart irrigation recommendations, pest and disease alerts, early warnings, and climate risk management through AI, GIS, and data analytics.

keyFeatures.name: Village-level Weather Monitoring
keyFeatures.description: Real-time weather monitoring at village level.

keyFeatures.name: Hyperlocal Forecasts
keyFeatures.description: Hyperlocal 8-day weather forecasts for precision planning.

keyFeatures.name: Smart Irrigation Scheduling
keyFeatures.description: Smart irrigation and fertilizer scheduling recommendations.

keyFeatures.name: Pest & Disease Alerts
keyFeatures.description: Pest and disease alerts with early warning systems.

keyFeatures.name: Village GIS Dashboards
keyFeatures.description: Village-level GIS dashboards for local governance.

keyFeatures.name: AI Climate Advisory
keyFeatures.description: AI-driven climate advisory and decision support.

valueProposition: Delivers hyperlocal climate intelligence through AIoT and GIS integration, enabling precision agriculture, optimized irrigation and fertilizer use, improved climate resilience, community empowerment, and a scalable "One Village – One Weather Station" model.
socialImpact: Empowered 4,500+ smallholder farmers across five pilot districts
Strengthened community preparedness for climate risks
expansionPlan: Scale the "One Village, One Weather Station" model across additional districts through government and CSR partnerships.
currentLocation: Sonipat, Haryana — active across 5 pilot districts

projectName: Ekarigari – AI-Integrated Agri Supply Chain & Farmer Marketplace Platform
shortDescription: AI-integrated farm-to-business supply chain platform connecting farmers directly with hotels, processors, and canteens for fair pricing and reduced post-harvest losses.
overview: Ekarigari directly connects small and marginal farmers with buyers such as hotels, food processing units, and canteens through an AI-integrated marketplace with demand forecasting and logistics optimization.
problemStatement: Small and marginal farmers face limited market access, price exploitation by intermediaries, high post-harvest losses, lack of fair pricing, and weak supply chain connectivity, resulting in reduced income and crop wastage.
solution: An AI-integrated farm-to-business supply chain platform that directly connects farmers with buyers such as hotels, food processing units, and canteens. The platform enables fair pricing, demand forecasting, logistics optimization, crop planning, and reduces post-harvest losses through digital market connectivity.

keyFeatures.name: AI Farmer Marketplace
keyFeatures.description: AI-powered marketplace for direct farmer-to-business connectivity.

keyFeatures.name: Fair Pricing
keyFeatures.description: Transparent pricing mechanism reducing intermediary dependency.

keyFeatures.name: Logistics Optimization
keyFeatures.description: Supply chain and logistics optimization for fresh produce.

keyFeatures.name: Crop Planning
keyFeatures.description: Crop planning and rotation guidance based on demand.

keyFeatures.name: Digital Onboarding
keyFeatures.description: Digital farmer onboarding with local language support.

keyFeatures.name: CRM Integration
keyFeatures.description: Customer relationship management for buyers and farmers.

valueProposition: Empowers farmers through direct market access, AI-driven insights, transparent pricing, and efficient supply chain management. Reduces dependency on intermediaries, improves farm profitability, minimizes crop spoilage, and promotes sustainable agriculture.
environmentalImpact: Reduced greenhouse gas emissions from spoilage
socialImpact: Promotes financial inclusion through digital literacy
expansionPlan: Expand F2B marketplace connectivity across Assam and North East India with logistics optimization targeting 26% cost reduction.

projectName: Enhanced Rock Weathering (ERW) – Nature-Based Carbon Removal
shortDescription: Enhanced Rock Weathering technology applying basalt rock dust to farmland for permanent carbon removal and soil fertility improvement.
overview: EELAB applies finely ground basalt rock dust to farmland where it reacts with atmospheric CO₂ and soil moisture to permanently convert CO₂ into stable carbonate minerals, integrating geospatial data, soil analytics, and farmer networks.
problemStatement: Agriculture faces declining soil fertility, increasing atmospheric CO₂ levels, reduced crop productivity, and dependence on chemical fertilizers. There is a need for scalable carbon removal technologies that simultaneously improve soil health and support sustainable farming.
solution: Enhanced Rock Weathering (ERW) technology applies finely ground basalt rock dust to farmland, where it naturally reacts with atmospheric CO₂ and soil moisture to permanently convert CO₂ into stable carbonate minerals. The platform integrates geospatial data, soil analytics, and farmer networks to implement ERW at scale across Indian farms.

keyFeatures.name: Nature-based Carbon Removal
keyFeatures.description: Permanent atmospheric CO₂ removal through rock weathering.

keyFeatures.name: Geospatial Site Selection
keyFeatures.description: Geospatial site selection and monitoring for ERW deployment.

keyFeatures.name: Soil Fertility Enhancement
keyFeatures.description: Soil remineralization and fertility improvement.

keyFeatures.name: Water Retention
keyFeatures.description: Improved water retention through soil remineralization.

keyFeatures.name: Digital MRV
keyFeatures.description: Digital Monitoring, Reporting & Verification for carbon credits.

keyFeatures.name: Farmer Network
keyFeatures.description: Farmer network engagement for scalable deployment.

valueProposition: Improves soil fertility and crop yields while permanently removing atmospheric CO₂. Generates high-integrity carbon credits, supports regenerative agriculture, increases farmer income, and provides a scalable model for India's rural carbon economy.
environmentalImpact: Improved soil pH and micronutrient balance
socialImpact: Increased farmer income through carbon credit generation
expansionPlan: Scale to 10,000 hectares across Washim and Madhya Pradesh by 2027, expanding to 100,000 hectares by 2030 through carbon credit and soil improvement partnerships.

shortDescription: Solar-electric multifunctional agricultural robotic bull for ploughing, weeding, seeding, spraying, and land leveling with AI-enabled precision features.
overview: Kisan Rover is a solar-electric multifunctional Agricultural Robotic Bull that performs ploughing, weeding, seeding, spraying, and land leveling with AI-enabled precision features and geospatial technologies.
problemStatement: Small and marginal farmers face high labor costs, shortage of agricultural workers, dependence on diesel-powered machinery and traditional animal labor, resulting in lower productivity, higher operational costs, and exposure to harmful pesticides.
solution: A solar-electric multifunctional Agricultural Robotic Bull that performs multiple farming operations such as ploughing, weeding, seeding, spraying, and land leveling. The system integrates AI-enabled precision features and geospatial technologies to improve productivity while reducing labor and operational costs.

keyFeatures.name: Multi-functional Robotic Machine
keyFeatures.description: Single machine for ploughing, weeding, seeding, spraying, and leveling.

keyFeatures.name: Solar-Electric Power
keyFeatures.description: Solar-electric powered operation with 5–6 hours battery backup.

keyFeatures.name: Precision Farming
keyFeatures.description: AI-enabled precision farming with geospatial mapping.

keyFeatures.name: Multi-row Coverage
keyFeatures.description: Covers up to 6 crop rows simultaneously.

keyFeatures.name: Reduced Pesticide Exposure
keyFeatures.description: Automated spraying reduces farmer health risks.

keyFeatures.name: Geospatial Mapping
keyFeatures.description: Future-ready autonomous operations and geospatial mapping.

valueProposition: Provides an affordable, solar-electric alternative to diesel-powered farm machinery. Reduces labor costs by up to 70%, saves time by 60%, lowers fuel expenses, improves productivity, and enables sustainable, emission-free farming for small farmers.
environmentalImpact: Zero carbon emissions through solar-electric operation
socialImpact: Empowers women farmers through lightweight equipment
Reduces physical strain on farm workers
expansionPlan: Expand field trials and commercial deployment across Assam and North East India through FPO and KVK partnerships.

projectName: IoT Enabled Autonomous Irrigation and Precision Farm Analytic
shortDescription: AI and IoT-enabled precision agriculture platform with autonomous irrigation, real-time field monitoring, and digital advisory across 50,000+ acres.
overview: CultYvate integrates low-cost sensors, weather stations, satellite data, machine learning, and digital advisory services to automate irrigation, optimize fertilizer use, and improve crop management through precision farm analytics.
problemStatement: Farmers face challenges such as inefficient irrigation, excessive water usage, high cultivation costs, lack of real-time field insights, and limited access to affordable precision farming technologies, resulting in lower productivity and profitability.
solution: An AI- and IoT-enabled precision agriculture platform that integrates low-cost sensors, weather stations, satellite data, machine learning, and digital advisory services to provide real-time field insights, automate irrigation, optimize fertilizer use, and improve crop management through precision farm analytics.

socialImpact: ₹21,000–₹23,000 income increase per acre per year

projectName: CropGen – AI Based Crop Monitoring & Advisory Platform
shortDescription: AI and satellite-based crop monitoring platform with Sentinel imagery, weather data, and LLM-powered localized agronomic advisory.
overview: CropGen integrates Sentinel imagery, weather data (ERA5 & NASA POWER), SoilGrids, local field data, and AI-driven agronomic models for real-time crop health monitoring, nutrient management, and localized advisories.
problemStatement: Farmers often lack access to real-time, localized crop monitoring and scientific agronomic advisory, leading to inefficient fertilizer use, poor irrigation planning, lower crop yields, and limited adoption of precision agriculture.
solution: An AI- and satellite-based Crop Monitoring & Advisory System (AAS) that integrates Sentinel imagery, weather data (ERA5 & NASA POWER), SoilGrids, local field data, and AI-driven agronomic models to provide real-time crop health monitoring, nutrient management, irrigation planning, and localized advisories.

socialImpact: Empowers rural farmers with digital agronomy
expansionPlan: Initial deployment across 10,000+ acres in Maharashtra with expansion through FPOs, agri-input stakeholders, government platforms, and API integrations.

projectName: BhoomiCrop Analytics SaaS and Mobile Platform
shortDescription: Precision agriculture SaaS integrating satellite, drone, IoT sensors, and AI for field-level crop intelligence and multilingual advisory.
overview: BhoomiCrop Analytics integrates satellite remote sensing, drone multispectral imagery, IoT-based soil sensors, AI/ML models, and multilingual advisory systems to deliver field-level crop intelligence and decision support.
problemStatement: Farmers, FPOs, and agribusinesses lack access to integrated field-level crop intelligence, making it difficult to optimize irrigation, fertilizer application, crop monitoring, pest detection, and yield prediction. Fragmented agricultural data leads to inefficient decision-making and underutilized farmland.
solution: A precision agriculture SaaS and mobile platform that integrates satellite remote sensing, drone multispectral imagery, IoT-based soil sensors, AI/ML models, Sentinel-2 imagery, vegetation indices (NDVI, NDWI, NDRI), weather data, and multilingual advisory systems to deliver field-level crop intelligence and decision support.

valueProposition: Enables evidence-based agricultural decision-making by integrating satellite, drone, and IoT data into a unified precision farming platform. Helps reduce input costs, improve crop productivity, validate agricultural products, and provide scalable digital advisory services for farmers and agribusinesses.
socialImpact: Empowers smallholder farmers with digital advisory
Enables data-driven planning for underserved regions
expansionPlan: Initial deployment across Uttarakhand, Rajasthan, Maharashtra, and Andhra Pradesh through partnerships with government agencies, FPOs, and agribusinesses using a B2B SaaS and API-based distribution model.

overview: Addble's Geospatial Commerce Layer integrates geolocation, product cataloging, logistics, AI-powered analytics, multilingual support, and ONDC APIs to connect sellers with buyers and enable seamless digital commerce.
problemStatement: Small businesses, artisans, farmers, and MSMEs face limited market access, poor product discoverability, inefficient logistics, and difficulties adopting digital commerce platforms, resulting in reduced income and financial inclusion.
solution: An ONDC-certified geospatial digital commerce platform that integrates geolocation, product cataloging, logistics, AI-powered analytics, multilingual support, and ONDC APIs to connect sellers with buyers, improve discoverability, optimize logistics, and enable seamless digital commerce.
